title: GMEM-012 Crazy play Research Institute OVER LIMIT OF PLEASURE - Manami Oura
description: The Female Body Torture Institute led by Tsujimaru, who was driven into a state of destruction by the Amazones Army ... The members of the Madness Torture Institute who vowed revenge on the Amazones Army swore revenge using super-powerful aphrodisiacs! The target of revenge was Manami Oura, one of the Amazones corps executives! Can Oura's beautiful body really endure crazy men and new drugs? The devilish pleasure execution of the Madness Torture Institute begins!
